title: Dropdown data not shown on Zapier
excerpt: Hi, I’m having a little trouble with my SMS integration. I’m using ClickSend SMS and Zapier as a medium. When I’ve gone to set up the action, I’ve tried to insert data from one of my dropdown columns from my monday.com b…

posts.author: SophieM (Sophie Middleton)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi, I’m having a little trouble with my SMS integration. I’m using ClickSend SMS and Zapier as a medium. When I’ve gone to set up the action, I’ve tried to insert data from one of my dropdown columns from my monday.com board but it isn’t showing on Zapier. Any advice?

Thanks.
